sum: Vanilla kit combinations for cheated results.|Some examples: Dragon Disciple Kensai, Swashbuckler Cleric, Monk sorcerer...
no: Cross-class kit combinations creating powerful hybrid kits. 29 unique kits mixing vanilla class abilities: Dragon Disciple Kensai, Monk Assassin, Swashbuckler Cleric, Shapeshifter Berserker, Sorcerer Monk, and more. French and English.

passive.desc: Fighter. Kensai/Dragon variant: enhanced unarmored combat with draconic abilities.

hlaPool.note: Standard fighter HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (class default). Derats Powerkits.

statBonus.note: +3 AC, +1 hit/dmg per 3 levels, -1 speed factor per 4 levels. Fire resist scales 25/50/75/100% at lv4/8/12/16. d12 HD. Non-chaotic. No armor/missiles.

passive.desc: Fighter. Defensive Barbarian: defensive stance + rage hybrid.

hlaPool.note: Standard fighter HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (class default). Derats Powerkits.

statBonus.note: +2 movement, immune to backstab, 10% phys resist per 5 levels (max 40%). d12 HD. Mastery axes/warhammers. Three-slot Two-Weapon. Splint mail max.

passive.desc: Ranger. Stalker/Prime: enhanced tracking and stealth.

hlaPool.note: Standard ranger HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: Standard ranger spells + Set Special Snare innate. Backstab x2/x3/x4.

statBonus.note: +15% Stealth and Set Traps. Set Trap equals Stealth. Studded leather max.

passive.desc: Ranger. Stalker/Assassin: ranger with poison and backstab.

hlaPool.note: Standard ranger HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: May not cast spells. Poison Weapon innate (scaling 1-13).

statBonus.note: +1 hit/dmg, +20% Move Silently/Hide. Backstab progression up to x7.

passive.desc: Ranger. Archer/Inquisitor: ranged combat + spell disruption.

hlaPool.note: Standard ranger HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: No spells. Innate: Dispel Magic (speed 1, 2x level), True Sight, Called Shot.

statBonus.note: Immune to hold/charm. +1 hit/dmg missile per 3 levels. Grand Mastery in bows/crossbows. No hide in shadows. Studded leather max. Melee weapons max 1 pip.

passive.desc: Paladin. Cavalier/Movement: enhanced mounted combat and speed.

hlaPool.note: Standard paladin HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: Standard paladin spells. Innate Remove Fear 1/day per level.

statBonus.note: +3 hit/dmg vs fiends/dragons/undead. Immune to hold/level drain/charm/fear/poison/morale. 20% fire and acid resist. No missiles. No Lay On Hands.

passive.desc: Cleric. Cleric/Swashbuckler: melee combat cleric with AC/THAC0 bonuses.

hlaPool.note: Standard cleric HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: Standard cleric spells. May not Turn Undead.

statBonus.note: +1 AC at lv1 plus +1 per 5 levels. +1 hit/dmg per 5 levels. Specialization (2 slots) in any cleric melee weapon. 3 slots Two-Weapon Style.

passive.desc: Druid. Shapeshifter/Rage: werewolf form combined with berserker rage.

hlaPool.note: Standard druid HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: Standard druid spells. Werewolf shapeshift + Greater Werewolf at lv13. Berserker Rage with winded penalty after.

statBonus.note: No missiles. No armor. No other shapeshifts.

passive.desc: Monk. Assassin Monk: backstab and poison with monk abilities.

hlaPool.note: Standard monk HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (class default). Derats Powerkits.

statBonus.note: +1 hit/dmg. Backstab x6/x7 at lv17-20/21+. Non-good. No Lay On Hands or Stunning Blow.

passive.desc: Monk. Killer Monk: enhanced lethal strikes.

hlaPool.note: Standard monk HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (class default). Derats Powerkits.

statBonus.note: +4% MR per level starting lv10 (max 100% at lv25). No magic items except weapons and boots.

passive.desc: Monk. Blade Monk: weapon-focused monk with blade specialization.

hlaPool.note: Standard monk HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (class default). Derats Powerkits.

statBonus.note: 2 slots in Two-Weapon and One-Weapon Styles. AC improves only every 3 levels.

passive.desc: Monk. Inquisitor Monk: anti-magic monk with spell disruption.

hlaPool.note: Standard monk HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (class default). Derats Powerkits.

statBonus.note: Immune to hold/charm. No Lay On Hands, Stunning Blow, or Quivering Palm.

passive.desc: Monk. Stalker Monk: stealth-focused monk with backstab.

hlaPool.note: Standard monk HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (class default). Derats Powerkits.

statBonus.note: +20% Move Silently/Hide. Backstab x2/x3/x4. Lawful Evil only. No Detect Illusion, no Lay On Hands or Stunning Blow.

passive.desc: Thief. Shapeshifter Thief: transformation abilities.

hlaPool.note: Standard thief HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (class default). Derats Powerkits.

statBonus.note: True Neutral only. No armor even with Use Any Item.

passive.desc: Thief. Thief of Tyr: justice-themed thief.

hlaPool.note: Standard thief HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (class default). Derats Powerkits.

statBonus.note: Priest weapons + bastard/longswords only. NG/LN only.

passive.desc: Thief. Thief of Tempus: war-themed thief.

hlaPool.note: Standard thief HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (class default). Derats Powerkits.

statBonus.note: 20 skill points/level. Chaotic/True Neutral only.

passive.desc: Thief. Kensai Thief: unarmored combat thief.

hlaPool.note: Standard thief HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (class default). Derats Powerkits.

statBonus.note: +2 AC, +1 hit/dmg per 3 levels, -1 speed factor per 4 levels. No missiles, no armor/gauntlets/bracers. 20 skill points/level. Non-chaotic.

passive.desc: Thief. Blade Thief: weapon specialist thief.

hlaPool.note: Standard thief HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (class default). Derats Powerkits.

statBonus.note: 3 slots Two-Weapon Style. 20 skill points/level.

passive.desc: Bard. Bard/Shaman: spirit summoning bard.

hlaPool.note: Standard bard HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: Access to Shaman-specific spells (Spirit Ward, Writhing Fog, Spiritual Clarity, Spirit Fire, Recall Spirit, Spiritual Lock, Ether Gate). Shamanic Song at will (replicates dance without movement/AC penalty).

statBonus.note: Limited weapons (dagger/club/spear/axe/staff/dart/sling/shortbow). NG/TN/NE only.

passive.desc: Bard. Skald/Totemic: totemic animal spirits with war songs.

hlaPool.note: Standard bard HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: Standard bard spells. Skald-style scaling song (+2 hit/dmg/AC at lv1; +4 plus fear immunity at lv15; plus stun/confusion immunity at lv20). Summon Spirit Animal 1/day (+1 per 5 levels).

statBonus.note: +1 hit/dmg. 1/4 Pick Pockets. True Neutral. Druid-usable weapons only.

passive.desc: Bard. Blade of Lathander: sun-themed blade dancer.

hlaPool.note: Standard bard HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: Standard bard spells. Innate Offensive Spin, Defensive Spin, Hold Undead (per 5 levels), Boon of Lathander (per 10 levels).

statBonus.note: 3 slots Two-Weapon Style. Cleric-usable weapons only. 1/2 Lore. 1/2 Pick Pockets. Good or True Neutral.

passive.desc: Mage. Mage of Talos: storm magic specialist.

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: +1 spell per level. +15% scribing Invocation. +2 save vs Invocation. -2 save penalty for enemies vs his Invocations. -15% scribing other schools. Innate Lightning Bolt and Storm Shield.

statBonus.note: -4 Constitution. Staffs and slings only. NE/CE/CN only.

passive.desc: Sorcerer. Entropic Sorcerer: chaos/entropy themed.

hlaPool.note: Standard sorcerer HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: +1 spell per level. Auto-learns Nahal's Reckless Dweomer/Chaos Shield/Improved Chaos Shield. Caster level fluctuates +/-5 randomly. 5% wild surge per cast.

statBonus.note: See passive description (Derats Powerkits). Research pending for specific modifiers.

passive.desc: Sorcerer. Monk Sorcerer: martial arts + sorcery hybrid.

hlaPool.note: Standard sorcerer HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: -2 spells per level per day. No missile weapons. No Stunning Blow/Quivering Palm.

statBonus.note: Fighting style progression. +2 movement plus +1 per 5 levels. +1/2 APR per 3 levels (max +3). +1 dmg/THAC0 per 3 levels (max +7). 3% MR per level from lv14. d6 HD. Lawful alignment.

passive.desc: Shaman. Beluga Shaman: water/ice spirit summoner.

hlaPool.note: Standard shaman HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: Standard shaman spells. Innate Find Familiar; level-gated Animal Summoning I/II/III at lv8/10/12.

statBonus.note: Clubs, quarterstaffs, and shortbows only.

passive.desc: Shaman. Justice Shaman: law-enforcing shaman.

hlaPool.note: Standard shaman HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: Six arcane spells added: Chromatic Orb, Web, Lightning Bolt, Improved Invisibility, Chaos, Chain Lightning. Shapeshift into wolf/black bear/brown bear at lv7, sword spider/baby wyvern/fire salamander at lv10.

statBonus.note: -2 STR/-2 CON. Leather armor max. True Neutral.

passive.desc: Shaman. Archer Shaman: ranged combat shaman.

hlaPool.note: Standard shaman HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: Standard shaman spells. Innate Called Shot.

statBonus.note: +1 hit/dmg missile per 3 levels. Grand Mastery in bows/crossbows. d6 HD.

passive.desc: Shaman. Skald Shaman: war song + spirit magic.

hlaPool.note: Standard shaman HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: Standard shaman spells. Skald-style dance (scaling +2 at lv1, +4 plus fear immunity at lv15, plus stun/confusion immunity at lv20). Dance doesn't prevent movement or impose AC penalty.

statBonus.note: +1 hit/dmg. Dance doesn't summon spirits.

passive.desc: Shaman. Totemic Shaman: animal spirit summoner.

hlaPool.note: Standard shaman HLA pool (Derats Powerkits cross-class kit).

spellRestrictions.note: Standard shaman spells. Innate Summon Spirit Animal 1/day (+1 per 5 levels). Cannot dance.

statBonus.note: See passive description (Derats Powerkits). Research pending for specific modifiers.

new: Fighter with Dragon Disciple fire resistance and Kensai combat focus.
Barbarian rage combined with Defender damage resistance.
Stalker stealth with Bounty Hunter traps.
Stalker with Assassin poison and backstab bonuses.
Archer ranged combat with Inquisitor dispel and True Sight.
Cavalier resistances with Undead Hunter immunities.
Cleric healing with Swashbuckler combat finesse.
Monk martial arts with Assassin poison and backstab.
Monk with Wizard Slayer magic resistance and spell failure.
Monk with Blade offensive and defensive spin.
Monk with Inquisitor dispel and True Sight.
Dark Moon monk with Stalker backstab and stealth.
Thief skills with Shapeshifter werewolf form.
Thief with Priest of Tyr divine justice abilities.
Thief with Priest of Tempus war abilities.
Thief with Kensai combat focus and bonuses.
Thief with Blade offensive and defensive spin.
Skald war chant with Totemic Druid spirit animals.
Blade with Priest of Lathander boon abilities.
Invoker with Priest of Talos storm abilities.
Sorcerer with Wild Mage surge and chaos abilities.
Sorcerer with Monk martial arts and movement.
Shaman with Beast Master animal summoning.
Shaman with Archer ranged bonuses and Called Shot.
Shaman with Totemic Druid spirit animals.
